name: section-heading
title: Section Heading
author: worthingtravis <https://github.com/Worthingtravis>
description: Heading with auto-generated anchor link. Click to copy the section URL. Anchor symbol appears on hover, positioned on whichever side has more space.
docs: Pass `id` for the anchor slug and heading content as `children`. Use `as` to change the heading level (h1-h6). Set `scrollMargin` to match your sticky header height.
